title: Dinghui Chen’s Personal Website
text:
Dinghui Chen
I am a Master of Financial Insurance student at the University of Toronto. I enjoy researching real-world problems, quantifying uncertainty, and continuously learning from what I don’t know.
This website collects my projects, technical notes, and research-oriented work.
